# Upstream Attribution

The compatibility codepoints and aliases in this project originate from an earlier upstream icon-font repository. PastureStack does not claim authorship of that pre-existing interface.

Git display names present in the upstream history before legal-history filtering include:

- Denise
- Lauren Vuchetich (`lvuch`)
- Vincent Fiduccia
- Westly Wright

The PastureStack integration commit is based directly on upstream commit `baec7faca0951a6560ac462395efee848f77912e`. Original commit identifiers, authorship, dates, tags, and license history remain available through the preserved Git history; this current-tree document does not duplicate contributor email addresses.

The PastureStack integration commit replaces the generated font and vector inputs in the current tree without rewriting the upstream commits. That replacement does not transfer authorship of the compatibility API to PastureStack. The existing Apache-2.0 license remains in `LICENSE`, and Lucide/Feather notices remain under `LICENSES/`.
